title: Vehicle damage is a state machine
discovery: A disabled tank is not dead. It may be stuck, immobile, recoverable, repairable, cannibalized, or abandoned, and each state has different consequences.
evidence: source_library/48_vehicle_recovery.md:15-17 - recovery splits into self-recovery, like-recovery, and dedicated recovery.
source_library/49_united_states_army_ordnance_corps.md:15-17 - ordnance and maintenance depth determine whether vehicles return to service.
source_library/42_army_service_forces.md:15-17 - supply and repair infrastructure sit behind the front line.
why: This changes combat outcome modeling from hit points to lifecycle management and battlefield salvage.

variable.name: immobility_state
variable.definition: Current operational state of the vehicle.

mechanic: Vehicle state transitions with towing, repair, and abandonment outcomes.
pressure: Mobility loss becomes a logistics event, not an immediate delete.
